raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white trash can with its lid open is on the floor. The lid is a flat, hinged panel attached to the can's body. STRATEGY - First, reach for the trash can body to position the arm. Then, grasp the lid's edge to lift it. Finally, place the lid back onto the can's opening. Failure modes include misaligning the lid during placement or dropping it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the trash can body for stable positioning; Step 2 grasp the lid's edge for lifting; Step 3 place the lid onto the can's opening.**
Goal: on(lid, trash_can); stable(lid)
Scene: trash_can, lid
Step 1: reach(trash_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the white trash can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, trash_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, trash_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(lid)
  affordance_region: the edge of the white trash can lid
  contact: holding(lid) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(lid)
Step 3: place(lid -> trash_can)
  affordance_region: the opening of the white trash can
  contact: surface_contact(lid, trash_can) [completion]; released(lid) [completion]
  pose: stable(lid) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(lid, trash_can) AND released(lid)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white trash can
the edge of the white trash can lid
the opening of the white trash can
